nasb.text: My inheritance has become to Me Like a lion in the forest; She has roared against Me; Therefore I have come to hate her.

esv.text: My heritage has become to me like a lion in the forest; she has lifted up her voice against me; therefore I hate her.

cnv.text: 我的產業對我， 就像樹林中的獅子向我咆哮， 因此我恨惡她。

ccb.text: 我的子民像林中的狮子一样向我吼叫， 因此我憎恶他们；
